title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason presents the /goal feature and related tools for autonomous coding workflows. The video covers setup, prompting techniques, and long-horizon task execution through /Mission exploration, positioning these as advances toward true autonomous coding.
